/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/vulkano_tests.dir/tests_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkano_tests.dir/stats_tests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkano_tests.dir/geometry_tests.cpp.o -o /Users/bruno/Documents/Development/bruno/vulkano_codex/bin/vulkano_tests  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /Users/bruno/Documents/Development/bruno/vulkano_codex/bin/libvulkano.a /Users/bruno/Documents/Development/bruno/vulkano_codex/bin/libCatch2Main.a /Users/bruno/Documents/Development/bruno/vulkano_codex/bin/libglm.a /Users/bruno/Documents/Development/bruno/vulkano_codex/bin/libimgui.a /Users/bruno/Documents/Development/bruno/vulkano_codex/bin/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation /usr/local/lib/libvulkan.dylib /Users/bruno/Documents/Development/bruno/vulkano_codex/bin/libCatch2.a
